_meta.framing: Suggested pathway inspired by Qur'anic themes. Product navigation metadata, not tafsir.
_meta.notice: Non-authoritative draft pathway suggestions, pending scholar review. Every entry is a suggested pathway inspired by Qur'anic themes — not tafsir, not fatwa, not a final mapping. Requires source checks and qualified scholar review before public use.
_meta.scope: 10 Qur'an life pathways + 12 user struggle mappings, linking to suggested surah numbers (1-114).

pathways.title: Finding Allah Again
pathways.short_description: Suggested pathway inspired by Qur'anic themes — for when Allah feels far and the heart wants to return.
pathways.caution_note: Suggested navigation only — not tafsir, not fatwa, not a ruling. Suggested surahs require source checks and qualified scholar review before public use.

pathways.title: Money, Rizq and Tawakkul
